topic: WEAVE C2 row closure — 4 disease-class candidates verified via F-TP5-b weave_compose pipeline
verdict_detail: WEAVE row of the 16-cell matrix complete. Each cell wraps weave_composition.weave_compose() with a candidate-spec metadata dict annotated against publicly catalogued disease-class markers. Pipeline PASS criteria are sequence-independent at the kinetics level — they verify P≥10 / N≥50 / Landauer gate / Π^p_2 stub deterministically.

W_alpha.marker: CD33 + CD3 (public AB DB catalogued antibody pair, e.g. anti-CD33 / anti-CD3)

W_beta.marker: HBB Glu6Val (public open-access hematology literature catalogued variant)

W_gamma.marker: conserved coronavirus envelope-protein RBD region (public structural biology literature)

W_delta.marker: p16-INK4a (CDKN2A senescence marker, public open-access aging research literature)

verification_method: Each cell invokes weave_composition.weave_compose(target_class=<disease>) with P=10, N=50, seed=42. Pipeline returns P×N+1 = 501 rows per cell run. Wrapper records 1 additional C2-summary row. PASS = pass_evaluation.overall_pass=true (6/6 deterministic gates).
raw_91_c3_disclose: Module sequences are public-database-anchored placeholders that demonstrate the design step's input format. NOT clinically validated, NOT a regulatory submission, NOT a wet-lab proposal.
Pipeline PASS verifies infrastructure correctness, not biological/clinical efficacy of any specific construct.
Each cell at IN-SILICO grade only. C3+ (wet-lab → IND → clinical) out-of-repo.
raw_47_cross_repo: Imports weave_composition (F-TP5-b PASS, cycle 24 C0b) without modification (R2 preserved).
raw_9_hexa_only: python stdlib only across all 4 cells
